series_metadata.series_description: Estimates of the annual yield of any proposed taxes of the verified copy of a proposed state law or constitutional amendment proposing the levy of any tax, any spreadsheets, data, programming algorithms and/or calculations used to determine the estimate, and any correspondence between the Secretary of State and the department of taxation regarding a 3519.04 estimate.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: no longer of administrative value. If scanned, . ; Electronic: no longer of administrative value
